package.name: perceptbot_perception
package.description: AIR26 workshop 05 — perception nodes that turn a camera image into things a behaviour can act on, independent of where the image comes from (Webots sim or the real ESP32-CAM). camera_processor publishes /camera/mean_intensity and /camera/mean_color; aruco_detector publishes ArUco detections (+ an annotated image). Mirrors the on-board maths the ESP32-CAM does for the cheap topics.
